nasb.text: As for the younger, she also bore a son, and called his name Ben-ammi; he is the father of the sons of Ammon to this day.

esv.text: The younger also bore a son and called his name Ben-ammi.  He is the father of the Ammonites to this day.

cnv.text: 小女兒也生了一個兒子，給他起名叫便．亞米，就是現在亞捫人的始祖。

ccb.text: 小女儿也生了一个儿子，给他取名叫便·亚米，他是今天亚扪人的祖先。

csbs.text: 至于小女儿，她也生了一个儿子，给他起名为本·亚米，他就是今天亚扪子孙的祖先。
